[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 001001101 4
1 110101000 4
2 000010001 2
3 100000000 1
4 100000001 2
5 011001110 5
6 111111000 6
7 000101100 3

01 10 000101000 2
12 21 000001100 2
23 32 000001000 1
34 43 000000000 a
45 54 000000000 a
56 65 100000000 1 match 3
67 76 000000000 a
70 07 011001000 3

02 20 001001000 2
13 31 000101000 2
24 42 000000001 1
35 53 100000000 1 match 3
46 64 000000001 1
57 75 000000000 a
60 06 100000000 1 match 3
71 17 000001100 2

03 30 110101000 4 match 1
14 41 000000000 a
25 52 000000000 a
36 63 100000000 1 match 3
47 74 000000000 a
50 05 100000000 1 match 3
61 16 000000000 a
72 27 001001100 3

04 40 000010000 1
15 51 000000000 a
26 62 000000001 1
37 73 010001000 2
[completion]
